mcqs.question: What is the main difference between DPDA and nondeterministic PDA?

options.text: DPDA has a larger stack size
DPDA has only one possible transition for every input symbol and stack symbol
DPDA can recognize only regular languages
DPDA is faster than nondeterministic PDA

mcqs.explanation: DPDA has only one possible transition for every input symbol and stack symbol, whereas nondeterministic PDA can have multiple possible transitions.

mcqs.question: Which of the following languages is recognized by a DPDA?

options.text: {a^n b^n | n ≥ 0}
{a^n b^m | n ≠ m}
{ww | w ∈ {a, b}*
{a^n b^n c^n | n ≥ 0}

mcqs.explanation: The language {a^n b^n | n ≥ 0} is a deterministic context-free language and can be recognized by a DPDA.

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of the stack in a DPDA?

options.text: To store the input string
To store the states of the DPDA
To store and retrieve symbols
To recognize regular languages

mcqs.explanation: The stack is used to store and retrieve symbols in a DPDA.

mcqs.question: Which of the following is a characteristic of a DPDA?

options.text: It can recognize only regular languages
It can recognize context-free languages
It has only one possible transition for every input symbol and stack symbol
It has a larger stack size than nondeterministic PDA

mcqs.explanation: A DPDA has only one possible transition for every input symbol and stack symbol.

mcqs.question: What is the difference between the transition function of a DPDA and a nondeterministic PDA?

options.text: The transition function of a DPDA returns a set of states, while the transition function of a nondeterministic PDA returns a single state
The transition function of a DPDA returns a single state, while the transition function of a nondeterministic PDA returns a set of states
The transition function of a DPDA returns a set of symbols, while the transition function of a nondeterministic PDA returns a single symbol
The transition function of a DPDA returns a single symbol, while the transition function of a nondeterministic PDA returns a set of symbols

mcqs.explanation: The transition function of a DPDA returns a single state, while the transition function of a nondeterministic PDA returns a set of states.
